title: Google-Only 24h Monitoring Log — Phase 14B.1
schedule: Check every 5 hours (GSC update interval per Qasem)
rule: Do NOT edit pages every 5 hours. Only act if: bug found, wrong page ranking, title/meta not showing, page not re-crawled AND eligible for GSC UI

checkpoints.note: BASELINE — 59 URLs submitted, 7 fixed pages in cooldown ~6h. CTR fixes applied, awaiting re-crawl.

initial_predictions.impressions_change: Likely stable 30-50/day — no new pages published, same queries
initial_predictions.clicks_change: Unlikely to change within 24h without re-crawl — CTR fixes need Google refresh
initial_predictions.position_change: Unlikely within 24h — SEO changes take days to weeks
initial_predictions.realistic_24h_goal: 1-2 visitors from long-tail queries + any existing indexed pages
